calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029 baseline monostrategy diagnostic (plain agent, hazard-event curriculum on/off)
items.note: Diagnostic: does the SD-029 balanced hazard-event curriculum alone lift action_class_entropy in a plain baseline agent (no V_s circuit, no MECH-284 hysteresis, no AIC/dACC/etc.)? Toggles scheduled_external_hazard_enabled in CausalGridWorldV2; OFF vs ON; 2 seeds x 6 episodes x 200 steps. PASS = entropy(SD-029=ON) > entropy(SD-029=OFF) + 0.1 in 2/2 seeds. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.
